Commencing Sunday, June 10, the
Northern Pacific announces the fol-
lowing Sunday excursion rates:


Spokane to Occur d'Alene and re.
turn. 81.


Spokane to st. Maries and return.
same date, $50.


Sunday train will leave Spokane .
q. m, returning arrive SPOKANE at Z
.. m. Steamer George Cakes con-
Meeting with train and making the
round trip to st. Maries ana return.
The George Cakes IN the largest and
best boat on the lake. She will here
after make the trip to st. Maries and
return daily. In addition TO above
rates the following will be in effect /:
Cocud d'Alens to Harrison and st.
Maries and return. Sunday. return
ing Same day. so cents; and st.
Maries or Harrison TO Occur d'Alene
and return. on sale Sunday. good re-
turning Monday. so cents.


J. w. HILL. Gen. Agt.
